metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal v0.1.5 is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

What is new in v0.1.5

  • Synthetic multi-regime CSV fixtures and Aedes proxy schema under data/ (not field entomology).
  • P3 noise robustness and P4 anti-sync protocol tests; notebook 04_p3_noise_robustness.py.
  • Lean Feigenbaum module: first-return combinatorial skeleton, tent period-2, conditional quadratic lemma; composite reduction split into three named open goals (honest sorry).
  • Binder runtime + badge; Jupyter notebooks 01–03.

Stack

  • Lean 4.14 (lake build): operational gate g(τₛ), band lemmas, Feigenbaum partial formalization.
  • Python reference core + golden rational bridge + pytest.
  • Public falsifiable predictions, experimental protocol, epistemic labels.

Companion production package: PyPI systemictau. Prior corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 are Feigenbaum-motivated defaults; a unique closed-form τ_ch = f(δ) remains open. Feigenbaum reduction open goals 1–3 remain sorry.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21516059.
